purpose: Mainline method/data provenance registry for the UAV paper project. Entries explicitly distinguish literature-backed model forms from scenario priors and disabled source types.

a2g_los_path_loss.title: Optimal LAP Altitude for Maximum Coverage
a2g_los_path_loss.notes: Used for the A2G LoS/NLoS path-loss form and sigmoid LoS probability parameters.
a2g_los_path_loss.local_reference_hint: 参考文献/论文文献/key reference/通信评估公式方法_底层变量的影响思路

morphology_fit.title: 3GPP TR 38.901
morphology_fit.notes: Used as the defended morphology/layout prior source for cellular layout assumptions and urban scenario parameterization.

ue_ul_fpc.title: 3GPP TS 36.213
ue_ul_fpc.notes: Used for LTE uplink fractional power control semantics. The project keeps a simplified, parameterized interface instead of a full scheduler loop.

ap_bs_slow_clpc.title: Cisco Radio Resource Management / Transmit Power Control
ap_bs_slow_clpc.notes: Used only as a slow-timescale AP/BS power-control approximation, not as packet-level or scheduler-level closed-loop control.

nakagami_gamma_sum.title: New Results on the Sum of Gamma Random Variates with Application to the Performance of Wireless Communication Systems
nakagami_gamma_sum.notes: Used for the aggregate-interference Gamma/Nakagami approximation, not to claim every single interferer is permanently modeled as a Nakagami channel object.

rotary_wing_energy.title: Energy-Efficient UAV Communication With Trajectory Optimization
rotary_wing_energy.notes: Used for the rotary-wing propulsion power model.
rotary_wing_energy.local_reference_hint: 参考文献/论文文献/key reference/A survey of energy efficient methods for UAV communication.pdf

aerpaw_dataset_18.title: Dataset-18: Ericsson 5G NSA network RF and throughput measurements on AERPAW network
aerpaw_dataset_18.notes: Project uses the measured trajectory bundle and does not infer a fictional full BS/interferer map from it in the measured-map branch.

dryad_wh70rxx06.title: Ericsson 5G NSA network RF and throughput measurements on AERPAW network

wifi_2_4g.notes: Frequency/power semantics are regulation-backed; AP density remains an explicit floor-area/adoption prior that must not be written as a measured city fact.

cellular_4g.notes: Mainline default PPP prior is derived from a UMa-like inter-site distance rather than an undocumented hardcoded density.

cellular_5g.notes: Mainline default PPP prior is derived from a UMi-like small-cell layout prior.

cellular_ue_ul.notes: Used as a controlled/source-profile type via simplified FPC semantics; background UE PPP remains opt-in.

gnss_jammer.notes: Kept in code for explicit what-if studies only. It is not part of the defended mainline because deployment prior and power semantics still require tighter scenario scoping.

industrial_device.notes: Kept for explicit ISM what-if studies only. Not used in the defended mainline until a narrower device class and density prior are chosen.

satellite_ground.notes: Disabled in the defended mainline because the generic Ku terminal class needs tighter product/antenna assumptions.
